description: Use this API to remove the VSC dc line model from a specified VSC dc line. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = vsdclmod_remove(dcname)

parameters.name: dcname
parameters.description: Vsc dc line name. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: no model at this VSC dc line.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
